name: Spiced Rice Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the rice and drain well.
2. Soak the rice for 2 hours to shorten cooking time (optional).
3. In a large non-stick saucepan, heat 1 tablespoon oil over medium heat.
4. Add the chopped onion and cook until tender, about 2-3 minutes.
5. Stir in the minced garlic and cook an additional minute.
6. Add the whole cloves and cook for another minute.
7. Stir in the rice and coat with the oil.
8. Add salt, chicken broth, and cinnamon stick to the pan.
9. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low.
10. Cover the saucepan and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until all liquid is absorbed.
11. Remove the cinnamon stick and stir in 1 teaspoon oil with raisins and almonds (or pine nuts).
12. Mix everything together and serve.
